subject: [PATCH 0/5] iova augmented rbtree O(log n) alloc_iova

reviews.author: Jason Gunthorpe
reviews.summary: Provided feedback on the KUnit test suite, suggesting improvements to make it more robust. Identified potential issues with the current implementation and proposed a fixture-based approach.

reviews.author: Rik van Riel
reviews.summary: Acknowledged Jason's feedback and promised to address the issues, including those found by Sashiko. Indicated a plan to post an updated version within a week or two.

2026-05-15.patch_summary: This patch series augments the iova rbtree to allow alloc_iova() to be O(log n), addressing performance issues in production workloads at Meta. The changes also add self-tests for the iova code and modify the KUnit test suite.
